chunks.title: Diarrhea Management Decision
chunks.content: In children up to 10 years of age with acute diarrhoea having risk factors (age, nutritional status, HIV status), what is the effectiveness of enhanced care (such as hospitalization, close clinical monitoring and/or longer follow-up after completion of treatment) compared to the usual care in improving clinical outcomes?

chunks.title: Evidence Status
chunks.content: Evidence too indirect to prepare GRADE tables

chunks.title: Hospitalization Conditions
chunks.content: Conditions for hospitalization: Age, Nutritional status, HIV status
